cost_components_summary: Annualised EAF finishing conversion cost excluding explicitly listed DRI, scrap, and electricity inputs.
input_basis_notes: Direct finishing inputs only. Electrode, flux, alloying, and casting details are outside the Phase 1 pilot boundary.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct finishing emissions only. Electricity-related emissions are represented through electricity-supply methods.
rollout_limit_notes: Pilot envelope only. Shares are indicative and exist to test decomposition topology, not to settle steel deployment constraints.
availability_conditions: Treated as material only from 2030 onward through share caps; 2025 row is retained for milestone completeness.
evidence_summary: Pilot split from the aggregate H2 DRI electric steel route plus electric finishing benchmarks; values are indicative topology-test data.
derivation_method: Reduced-form decomposition split. Aggregate H2 DRI route electricity, scrap, and finishing emissions are separated from upstream DRI production.
review_notes: Pilot split of the aggregate H2 DRI route. Finishing intensity is approximate and should be replaced by plant-route evidence.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Expand into EAF, casting, rolling, scrap blending, and intermediate DRI balance modules.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Consumes direct_reduced_iron from make_direct_reduced_iron in the decomposition pilot.
